'''''Hunter's Luck''''' was one of the myriad of [[Starship/Legends|ships]] owned and operated by [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] when she was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. It had originally been a rich kid's private [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]], but was then captured by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].<ref name="The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
